creator: heinrich.adam@iml.unibe.ch
text:
Wednesday ist over but the error is still the same !

root@test:~ # pkg install xfce
Updating repository catalogue
pkg: No packages matching 'xfce' available in the repositories
(In reply to Olivier Duchateau from comment #3)
> Meta port, x11-wm/xfce4 was not available due to x11-thems/icons-tango
> failure (in fact, after recent update of graphics/ImageMagick revisions
> r358176, and r358277).
> 
> Packages are only built on Wednestday, so be patient.
> 
> For more details, see this page [1] (select your release).
> 
> [1] http://beefy2.isc.freebsd.org/bulk/
